backend/main.mo: Motoko canister implementing an investment dashboard backend with asset, portfolio, historical data, exchange rate types, access control, blob storage integration, price/API status caching, and default asset initialization.
feature_evidence.json: Structured report documenting frontend stability features related to React Query refetch behavior, portfolio rendering stability, and diagnostics, including affected files, components, tests, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten high-level summaries of frontend source files and assets, describing responsibilities of React components, hooks, services, styles, and configuration for the investment dashboard.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the PWA with meta tags, theme handling, startup loading spinner, and robust pre-React error UI for initialization failures.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA manifest defining app metadata, icons, colors, display mode, categories, and Norwegian language settings for the portfolio dashboard.
frontend/public/sw.js: Minimal service worker providing basic offline caching for core assets, handling install, fetch, and cache cleanup events.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component wiring together theming, global error handling, suspense loading shell, header/footer layout, and tabbed dashboard sections for portfolio analysis.
frontend/src/components/FatalErrorScreen: Renders a full-screen fatal error UI showing the error message, optional stack and component details, and actions to reload the app or copy detailed diagnostics to the clipboard.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Displays the application footer with an investment disclaimer, data source information, last-updated timestamp, optional PWA install button, and copyright branding.
frontend/src/components/GlobalErrorBanne: Shows a fixed, dismissible global error banner using shared error state, with options to copy diagnostics, reload the app, or clear the error.
frontend/src/components/GlobalErrorState: Defines a React context and provider for managing a single global error object, exposing hooks to set or clear application-wide errors.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Renders the app header with theme toggling, asset filtering, export placeholders, and a live/partial/offline API status badge based on price and exchange-rate queries.
frontend/src/components/HistoricalPerfor: Displays historical asset performance using line charts and tables, pulling portfolio and asset price history data with loading skeletons and formatted metrics.
frontend/src/components/HistoricalPortfo: Shows a time-series line chart of total portfolio value with formatting, error handling, and a fullscreen toggle, backed by historical portfolio data queries.
frontend/src/components/MonthlyYield.tsx: Displays projected ICP monthly and yearly yield calculations using portfolio data, with a price slider and charts to visualize compounded returns in ICP, USD, and NOK.
frontend/src/components/NewsSection.tsx: Renders a mock market news feed with sentiment badges and asset-based filtering, using tabs and cards for basic news browsing UI.
frontend/src/components/PortfolioOvervie: Main portfolio dashboard showing asset allocations, performance, charts, and historical data, with editing dialogs and live price integration via query hooks.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallButton: Provides a mobile-only button to install the app as a PWA, handling native install prompts or showing manual iOS/Android instructions in a dialog.
frontend/src/components/RiskMetrics.tsx: Displays mock portfolio risk metrics and asset risk breakdowns using cards, tables, progress indicators, and radar charts.
frontend/src/components/RootErrorBoundar: Global React error boundary that catches rendering errors and renders a custom fallback UI with a reset mechanism.
frontend/src/components/SafeAppShell.tsx: Skeleton-based fallback app shell used to display a loading-safe layout while the main application initializes.
frontend/src/components/ScenarioAnalysis: React component that displays portfolio scenario analysis (Base/Bull/Bear) with adjustable growth-rate sliders and projected values over multiple timeframes, based on current portfolio data. It formats currency/percentages and uses tabs, tables, and badges to visualize outcomes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches a backend actor tied to the current Internet Identity, returning an anonymous actor when unauthenticated. It recreates the actor on identity change and invalidates/refetches all dependent queries when the actor updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useDailyHistoryAppend: Hook that safely checks and appends a daily historical portfolio data point, running once on mount and then scheduling execution at 18:00 Europe/Oslo each day. It handles actor availability gracefully and invalidates portfolio history queries after updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useGlobalErrorCapture: Hook that registers global window error and unhandled promise rejection listeners and stores captured errors in a shared GlobalErrorState for centralized reporting. It logs errors and cleans up listeners on unmount.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context and hooks for managing Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, identity persistence, and detailed login status flags. It wraps AuthClient creation, configuration loading, and delegation validation for app-wide use.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks, types, and defaults for fetching and composing portfolio data, prices, exchange rates, and historical values. It provides fallback assets and historical data for immediate UI rendering while backend and APIs load.
frontend/src/hooks/useSafeActor.ts: Defensive wrapper around useActor that ensures access control initialization happens once per actor and never throws. It exposes readiness and error states while allowing the app to continue even if initialization fails.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry defining design tokens (CSS variables) for light/dark themes, base element styles, layout defaults, and utility classes for charts, finance indicators, animations, and scrollbars.
frontend/src/lib/priceService.ts: Service layer for fetching crypto, stock, and USD→NOK exchange rates from CoinGecko, Finnhub, and ExchangeRate-API with in-memory caching, detailed status metadata, logging, and robust fallback defaults.
frontend/src/lib/queryDiagnostics.ts: Lightweight debugging utility that logs and de-duplicates React Query invalidation/refetch events with throttling and provides summary and reset helpers.
frontend/src/lib/reactQueryKey.ts: Utilities for building and validating JSON-serializable React Query keys by normalizing primitives (e.g., BigInt, Date) and enforcing safe key composition in development.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Frontend entry point that initializes React, sets up the React Query client, wraps the app with Internet Identity authentication, and mounts the root component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration enabling class-based dark mode, custom theme tokens mapped to CSS variables, animations, container settings, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Machine-readable snapshot of the project’s current state, including versioning, high-level product summary, and a structured list of implemented features and capabilities.
